name: bulbous water dispenser
description: This device almost looks like an earthly water cooler, but the base is made of scrap metal, and the tank is a bulbous, black glass globe that obfuscates its contents.  It has no tap; instead, the base has a small compartment with a plastic flap, resembling that of a vending machine.  Examine it to dispense drinks, if it has any.

effect.title: You see a seven-segment LED display and a circular button.  The display reads: <u_val:nl_safehouse_water_stock>
